## TABLE: ServiceInstall
ServiceInstall=LuminalShineSessionMonServiceInstall|Name=LuminalShineSessionMonitor|DisplayName=LuminalShine Session Monitor|ServiceType=16|StartType=2|ErrorControl=1|LoadOrderGroup=|Dependencies=|StartName=|Password=|Arguments=|Component_=LuminalShineSessionMonSvc|Description=Records per-stream telemetry (encode latency, throughput, FPS, host CPU/GPU/RAM/VRAM, connection-quality events) so the LuminalShine Web UI's Session Details panel can render historical session graphs. Crash-isolated from the main streaming service.
ServiceInstall=LuminalShineXboxBtHelperServiceInstall|Name=LuminalShineXboxBtHelper|DisplayName=LuminalShine Xbox Bluetooth Helper|ServiceType=16|StartType=2|ErrorControl=1|LoadOrderGroup=|Dependencies=|StartName=|Password=|Arguments=|Component_=LuminalShineXboxBtHelperSvc|Description=Nudges Steam's XInput hotplug path so reconnected Bluetooth Xbox controllers are picked up without delay. Disabled by default; opt in via luminalshine_xboxcontroller_state.json.

Action=SetStopSvcQuietImmediate|Type=51|Source=QtExecCmdLine|Target="[POWERSHELL_PATH]" -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "& { foreach ($name in @('SunshineService','LuminalShineService','LuminalShineXboxBtHelper','LuminalShineSessionMonitor')) { $svc = Get-Service -Name $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($svc -and $svc.Status -ne 'Stopped') { for ($i = 0; $i -lt 5; $i++) { Stop-Service -Name $name -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { $svc.WaitForStatus('Stopped','00:00:10'); break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } } } } }"|ExtendedType=
Action=SetStopSvcQuiet|Type=51|Source=StopSvcQuiet|Target="[POWERSHELL_PATH]" -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -Command "& { foreach ($name in @('SunshineService','LuminalShineService','LuminalShineXboxBtHelper','LuminalShineSessionMonitor')) { $svc = Get-Service -Name $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($svc -and $svc.Status -ne 'Stopped') { for ($i = 0; $i -lt 5; $i++) { Stop-Service -Name $name -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; try { $svc.WaitForStatus('Stopped','00:00:10'); break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 } } } } }"|ExtendedType=

## TABLE: Condition
